challenges.title: Expensive Purchase Decision
challenges.question: What's the best approach when you want to buy an expensive item?

options.text: Buy it immediately if you have enough money
Wait and save money over time while considering if you really need it
Ask friends to lend you money
Buy it on credit even if you can't afford it

feedback.correct: Excellent! Waiting and saving helps you make thoughtful decisions and avoid impulse purchases.
feedback.wrong: Remember: Take time to evaluate if you really need expensive items before buying.

challenges.title: Needs vs Wants
challenges.question: Which of these is a 'need' rather than a 'want'?

options.text: Groceries for your family
Latest smartphone
Designer clothes
Video game console

feedback.correct: Perfect! Groceries are essential for survival, making them a need rather than a want.
feedback.wrong: Think about what's essential for survival - groceries are a basic need.

challenges.title: Unexpected Money
challenges.question: What should you do with unexpected money like a gift or bonus?

options.text: Spend it all on something fun immediately
Ignore it and pretend you never received it
Save at least half and spend the rest thoughtfully
Use it to pay off all your friends' debts

feedback.correct: Great balance! Balancing saving and spending helps build healthy financial habits.
feedback.wrong: A good rule: Save most of unexpected money, but allow some for thoughtful spending.

challenges.title: Price Comparison
challenges.question: What's the benefit of comparing prices before making a purchase?

options.text: It helps you find the best value and save money
It wastes time and prevents spontaneous decisions
It makes shopping more complicated
It's only useful for expensive items

feedback.correct: Smart thinking! Price comparison helps you make informed decisions and stretch your budget further.
feedback.wrong: Comparing prices helps you find better deals and save money, even on small purchases.

challenges.title: Entertainment Budget
challenges.question: What's a good strategy for managing a limited entertainment budget?

options.text: Spend it all in one day to maximize enjoyment
Plan affordable activities and look for free options
Borrow money to increase your entertainment budget
Avoid all entertainment to save money

feedback.correct: Perfect planning! Planning helps you enjoy entertainment while staying within your means.
feedback.wrong: Balance is key - plan affordable activities that fit your budget rather than overspending or avoiding fun entirely.

result.winMessage: You made {{score}} smart spending decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
result.smartChoicesText: You chose to distinguish needs from wants, compare prices, plan entertainment budgets, and make thoughtful spending decisions.
result.wisdomText: These habits will help you manage your money wisely and achieve your financial goals!
result.loseMessage: You made {{score}} smart spending decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
result.loseAdvice: Remember, smart spending means distinguishing needs from wants, comparing prices, and making thoughtful financial decisions.
